notes:
Performance.

The app was redrawing too much on every screen — a full-screen animated shader, the rain, and frosted glass all going constantly. On a real phone that pins the GPU and makes everything feel slow, including starting a book. (2.23.5's audio pre-warm ran during startup and made it worse; moved out of the way.)

- Aurora and rain now redraw far less often (looks the same, much lighter) and are isolated so they don't drag the rest of the screen.
- NEW LITE MODE (Settings): one tap turns off rain, aurora and glass for a fast plain app — best on older phones.

If it still feels slow, turn on Lite mode and tell me if that fixes it.
